findings.title: Markdown backend updateManyTasks rewrites each file individually
findings.detail: updateManyTasks loops over ids calling updateTask (which does fs.writeFileSync) one at a time. For bulk updates of 100+ tasks, this could be slow. The SQLite backend handles this in a single UPDATE statement. Not a bug — expected given the Markdown storage model — but worth noting for users who pick Markdown with large task counts.
findings.impact: Low — Markdown backend is designed for smaller task sets and the user consciously opts in.
